channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: WHO prequalifies first malaria medicine designed specifically for infants
item.description: The World Health Organisation (WHO) has granted prequalification approval for a malaria treatment specifically formulated for newborns and infants, marking a first in the fight against this deadly dis...

item.title: China Matches and Exceeds U.S. in Research Spending, Raising Strategic and Economic Questions
item.description: China has reached a major milestone in global science: its research and development (R&D) spending now equals or surpasses that of the United States when measured by purchasing power, with both countr...

item.title: Jerema criticizes O'Toole's advice to Conservatives on facing Carney's Liberals
item.description: In this National Post opinion piece published April 24, 2026, Carson Jerema argues that former Conservative leader Erin O'Toole's recent advice would lead to a permanent Liberal government under Prime...

item.title: Iran Executes Individual Accused of Acting for Israeli Intelligence During Protests
item.description: On April 25, 2026, Iran executed Erfan Kiani after his conviction for undertaking a mission on behalf of Israel's spy agency was upheld by the Supreme Court, according to the judiciary's Mizan Online....

item.title: Twenty years since the Beaconsfield mine rescue in Tasmania
item.description: Twenty years on from the Beaconsfield mine disaster in northeast Tasmania, Australians continue to remember the extraordinary events of 2006. A minor earthquake triggered a collapse in the mine, killi...

item.title: Common fuel-saving myths debunked as fuel prices continue to rise
item.description: With fuel prices in South Africa expected to climb sharply again, motorists are under pressure to cut costs wherever possible. However, not all commonly shared fuel-saving tips are actually effective....

item.title: Justin Trudeau's Visit to Australia Highlights Celebrities Capitalising on Speaking Engagements
item.description: Former Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau is the latest high-profile figure to visit Australia for a speaking engagement, following the recent whirlwind visit by Prince Harry and Meghan Markle. Tr...

item.title: Spectators Allowed for PSL 11 Final Following Franchise Owners’ Request
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has given approval for fans to attend the final match of the 11th edition of the Pakistan Super League (PSL), according to Interior Minister and PCB Chairman Mohsin Naqvi...

item.title: Chornobyl Nuclear Site Remains Vulnerable Amid Ongoing Conflict
item.description: Forty years after the Chornobyl disaster, the site remains perilously exposed, especially following Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine in 2022. The New Safe Confinement (NSC), completed in 2019 t...

item.title: BJP criticises Kejriwal over luxury residences, AAP denies allegations
item.description: On 25th April 2026, the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) launched a strong critique against Arvind Kejriwal, following the departure of Raghav Chadha and six other Rajya Sabha MPs from the Aam Aadmi Party...

item.title: Anaheim Ducks surge past Edmonton Oilers in high-scoring Game 3 to take series lead
item.description: The Anaheim Ducks earned a 7-4 victory over the Edmonton Oilers in Game 3 of their first-round playoff series, taking a 2-1 lead while hosting their first home playoff game in eight years. Fueled by a...

item.title: Punjab govt warns officers against bypassing procedure for Haj duty applications
item.description: The Punjab government has shown clear displeasure over certain BS-18 officers who applied directly to the federal Ministry of Religious Affairs for Haj duty without following proper administrative cha...

item.title: Why social media can give a false picture of real relationship health
item.description: This opinion piece reflects on how many people admire relationships they see on social media without knowing the reality behind them. The writer explains that while online couples may appear happy, st...

item.title: Manitoba crypto companies warn provincial regulations could force closures
item.description: Several cryptocurrency companies based in Winnipeg, Manitoba, have expressed serious concerns about proposed provincial regulations that could severely impact their operations. Business owners argue t...

item.title: KRA Explains How Taxpayers Can Settle Arrears Before April 30 to Avoid Penalties
item.description: The Kenya Revenue Authority (KRA) has urged taxpayers to clear any outstanding tax arrears before the April 30, 2026 deadline to avoid penalties and additional interest. The notice follows messages se...

item.title: Nigerian Football Update: Season Finale, Promotions, and Financial Penalties
item.description: The Nigerian Professional Football League (NPFL) is heading towards a dramatic conclusion on May 24th, with several significant developments unfolding. Rancher's Bees have officially confirmed their r...

item.title: Geographical naming as a tool for democratic transformation in South Africa
item.description: In this opinion piece, Lorraine Shabangu reflects on the significance of geographical naming in South Africa’s democratic journey, particularly during Freedom Month. She argues that place names are no...

item.title: The Unseen Drama at the Pub: More Than Just Beer
item.description: A visit to the pub is not just about enjoying a cold beer; it's about witnessing the real-life dramas that unfold before your eyes. From a man showing off his wealth by ordering a large number of beer...

item.title: US Moves to Ease Marijuana Restrictions, Potentially Reshaping $47bn Industry
item.description: In a significant shift in US drug policy, the Department of Justice announced plans to relax marijuana restrictions, marking one of the biggest policy changes in decades. Although this does not legali...

item.title: Lakers defeat Rockets in overtime to take 3-0 series lead
item.description: Kinuha ng Los Angeles Lakers ang isang crucial na panalo laban sa Houston Rockets, 112-108 sa overtime ng Game 3 ng kanilang first-round playoff series. Dahil dito, umangat ang Lakers sa 3-0 lead at i...
